title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TCI Express

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TCI Express
jsonLd.description:
Join the TCI Express family as a Fleet Manager in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TCI Express:
TCI Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TCI Express!
